title: Plugin Data Record
description: Universal document envelope for all plugin data stored in Life Engine Core. Each record belongs to a plugin and collection, with an opaque JSON data payload validated at the application layer.

plugin_id.description: The plugin that owns this record (reverse-domain notation).

collection.description: The collection this record belongs to (e.g., 'tasks', 'contacts').

data.description: Opaque JSON payload. Schema validation is performed at the application layer against the collection's registered schema.

version.description: Optimistic concurrency version. Incremented on every update.

created_at.description: Record creation timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

updated_at.description: Last modification timestamp in RFC 3339 format.
